headline: FPT Partners with Nuummite and e-CENS to Explore Strategic Technology Collaboration Across the Middle East and Africa
summary: HANOI, Vietnam, July 22, 2026--Global technology corporation FPT and Nuummite, a MEA-based digital transformation and intelligent automation firm, have signed a Strategic Cooperation Agreement to advance collaboration across the Middle East and Africa, creating a stronger platform for enterprise transformation through customer experience, data, AI, and cloud solutions.
